phrases.intent_en: Ask which lungarno is best for a walk
phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è il lungarno più bello per passeggiare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwahl eh eel loon-GAR-noh PYOO BEL-loh per pas-sed-JAH-reh?
phrases.cultural_note: The lungarni are Pisa's riverside embankments — the south bank (Lungarno Mediceo) is lined with historic palaces.

responses.english: The Lungarno Mediceo, on the north bank, is the most historic.
responses.phonetic: eel loon-GAR-noh meh-dee-CHEH-oh, SOOL-lah REE-vah nord, eh eel PYOO STOH-ree-koh.
responses.local: Il Lungarno Mediceo, sulla riva nord, è il più storico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to hire a canoe on the Arno
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si noleggiano le canoe sull'Arno?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see noh-lej-JAH-noh leh kah-NOH-eh sool-LAR-noh?

responses.english: At the rowing club, Lungarno Fibonacci.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Palazzo Blu exhibition centre is

responses.english: On the Lungarno Gambacorti, south bank, you'll recognise it by its colour.
responses.phonetic: sool loon-GAR-noh gam-bah-KOR-tee, REE-vah sood, see ree-koh-NOH-sheh dal koh-LOH-reh.
responses.local: Sul Lungarno Gambacorti, riva sud, si riconosce dal colore.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to cross the Arno near the Leaning Tower
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale ponte è più vicino alla Torre Pendente?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh PON-teh eh PYOO vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah TOR-reh pen-DEN-teh?

responses.english: The Ponte della Fortezza, ten minutes away.
responses.phonetic: eel PON-teh DEL-lah for-TET-sah, ah DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Il Ponte della Fortezza, a dieci minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where students and locals gather in the evening
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si ritrovano i pisani la sera?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see ree-TROH-vah-noh ee pee-ZAH-nee lah SEH-rah?

responses.english: On the lungarno and at Piazza delle Vettovaglie.
responses.phonetic: sool loon-GAR-noh eh een PYAHT-tsah DEL-leh vet-toh-VAL-yeh.
responses.local: Sul Lungarno e in Piazza delle Vettovaglie.
